acceptance_criteria: Failure-mode bundle proof beyond immediate invalid-edit rejection: fill-end validation revert, cogsPerUnit rejection, clipboard rejection, paste overflow, locked-column suppression, and hidden-row preservation.

assertions.label: Fill end reverts when a filled value fails field validation
assertions.expected: onChange is NOT called when onFillEnd produces a row with invalid quantity (-1); snapshot restore prevents propagation.
assertions.observed: Unit test: reverts fill-end when a filled value fails field validation

assertions.label: Invalid cogsPerUnit edit is rejected with revert to previous value
assertions.expected: onCellValueChanged with cogsPerUnit=0 triggers revert to original cogsPerUnit=10 and surfaces toast error.
assertions.observed: Unit test: rejects invalid cogsPerUnit edit and reverts to the previous value

assertions.label: Invalid inline quantity edit reverts to last valid state
assertions.expected: onCellValueChanged with quantity=-2 triggers revert and surfaces toast error.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 434): reverts rejected inline edits back to the last valid line-item state

assertions.label: Invalid clipboard values on approved fields are rejected with structured messages
assertions.expected: processCellFromClipboard returns original value and surfaces blocked message for invalid quantity -2.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 462): blocks invalid clipboard edits on approved fields and surfaces the rejection

assertions.label: Paste rectangles that spill into locked columns are rejected
assertions.expected: processDataFromClipboard returns null and surfaces blocked message when paste width exceeds editable column span.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 490): rejects paste rectangles that spill into locked document columns

assertions.label: Cut suppression on locked columns with structured rejection
assertions.expected: suppressKeyboardEvent returns true for Ctrl+X on lineTotal with rejection message.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 522): suppresses cut shortcuts when the current selection includes locked document columns

assertions.label: Delete suppression on locked columns with structured rejection
assertions.expected: suppressKeyboardEvent returns true for Delete on productDisplayName with rejection message.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 583): suppresses delete shortcuts when the current selection includes locked document columns

assertions.label: Fill blocked on locked columns with structured rejection
assertions.expected: onFillStart surfaces blocked message when selection extends to lineTotal.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 639): surfaces a blocked fill message when selection reaches locked document columns

assertions.label: Hidden rows preserved during fill writeback
assertions.expected: Fill end iterates normalizedItems by rowId, preserving rows not visible in the grid display.
assertions.observed: Pre-existing unit test (line 380): keeps hidden rows and original order stable when fill writeback follows grid display order

undo_across_autosave.note: Undo-across-autosave is a sub-requirement that requires end-to-end integration testing with the real autosave pipeline. Unit tests cannot exercise the full undo/redo stack across an autosave round-trip.

prior_review.label: Code-proven closure via unit tests
prior_review.conclusion: The failure-mode bundle is comprehensively covered: 2 new tests for fill-end validation revert and cogsPerUnit rejection, plus 7 pre-existing tests for inline revert, clipboard rejection, paste overflow, locked-column suppression (cut, delete, fill), and hidden-row preservation. Undo-across-autosave deferred as a limitation requiring end-to-end integration.
